flashcards.back: Ratio of correct predictions to total predictions: (TP+TN)/(TP+TN+FP+FN)

flashcards.front: When is precision preferred over accuracy?
flashcards.back: When false positives are costly (e.g., spam detection)
Probability that classifier ranks random positive instance higher than negative

flashcards.front: What does MSE measure in regression?
flashcards.back: Average squared difference between predicted and actual values

flashcards.front: What R² value indicates perfect fit?
What metric combines specificity and sensitivity?

flashcards.back: Table showing TP, TN, FP, FN for classification results

flashcards.front: Why use stratified sampling in metrics?
flashcards.back: Preserve class distribution in train/test splits
Equal weight to all classes' F1 scores
Measure agreement between raters accounting for chance
